value: Oczy is a Plastic World Model Agent monorepo that turns experience into changed weights rather than retrieved traces.
The north-star metric is behavior_delta_per_byte_of_persistent_memory; a high score means the organism learns a lot while keeping persistent memory small.
Oczy's architecture thesis is that memory should become changed dynamics: activation -> fast state -> fast weights -> neural memory -> slow weights -> forgetting raw trace.
Oczy rejects the 'chat log -> vector DB -> prompt stuffing' memory architecture.

The Oczy organism roadmap has 9 phases: 0 predictive foundation, 1 learned value critic, 2 response policy, 3 differentiable plasticity, 4 intrinsic motivation, 5 hierarchical skills, 6 meta-RL, 7 internal simulation, 8 self-curriculum.
The workspace packages are correction-benchmark, experience-autoencoder, identity-hypernetwork, neural-hippocampus, oczy_common, oczy_lm, plastic-cortex, skill-immune-cortex, and world-model-critic.
The default dimensions in KVCortexConfig are d_cortex=128, d_embd=2048, n_layers=28.
KVCortexConfig defaults are d_cortex=128, d_embd=2048, n_layers=28, alpha_warm=0.02, alpha_correction=5.0, and steering_mode='proj_random'.
KVCortex supports steering_mode='proj_random' (per-layer cvecs from proj_c @ warm_state) and 'raw_hidden' (last correction hidden broadcast across layers).
KVCortex has warm_state (session-mutable, dies on restart) and cold_state (boot-loaded, written only by consolidate).
CortexAgentConfig defaults are KVCortexConfig(), CVecDriverConfig(embedding=True), and articulate_scale=0.001.

CortexAgent.save() persists cortex_cold, cortex_proj_hidden, cortex_proj_c, cortex_config, neural_hippocampus, world_model_critic, identity_hypernetwork, skill_immune_cortex, and experience_autoencoder.
CortexAgent._looks_like_correction() detects textual correction markers such as 'no', 'wrong', 'incorrect', 'actually', 'correction', 'should be', and 'not quite'.
The default model file loaded by LlamaCVecDriver is LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf from the LiquidAI/LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct-GGUF repository.
LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct-Q4_K_M.gguf
peek_embedding() requires CVecDriverConfig(embedding=True) at load time, otherwise the llama.cpp embedding path is disabled.
Cortex steering is applied via llama_set_adapter_cvec, a per-context control-vector surface exposed by llama-cpp-python.
GOALS.md Goal 1 requires writing real (k, v) pairs into a reserved KV slot.
GOALS.md Goal 2 requires hidden-state extraction at layer L.
GOALS.md Goal 3 upgrades the five metabolism organs to consume tensor signals from the cortex instead of string features.
NeuralHippocampus stores high-surprise experiences and replays compressed traces so the cortex can consolidate them.
WorldModelCritic tracks prediction error / surprise to gate what becomes a memory update.
IdentityHypernetwork maintains a compact latent identity vector and generates adapter deltas from it.
SkillImmuneCortex acts as regression guards, detecting and isolating mistakes that should not be consolidated.
ExperienceAutoencoder compresses raw episode traces into latent Delta-z representations for efficient storage.
correction-benchmark provides a curriculum and scoring harness for correction-driven lifelong-learning agents.
The organism curriculum has 6 stages: sense grounding, transfer within domain, scope control, dialog, consolidation stress, and cross-domain retention.
Stage 2 scope control fails because the default PlasticCortex backend can only store one corrected sense per token.
KVCortex.init_proj_c_from_svd(hiddens) initializes proj_c from the top-d_cortex right singular vectors of centered correction hiddens, broadcasting the same slab to every layer.
The shape of experiments/lm_perception/reports/correction_hiddens.npy is (72, 2048).
The top singular values reported for correction_hiddens.npy are [179, 153, 133, 120, 112, 109, 100, 99].
The KnowledgeStore class lives in experiments/codebase_qa/knowledge_store.py and supports embedding-based or keyword-fallback retrieval.
The 2026-06-25 SVD work found that cvec steering is a posture bias, not retrievable knowledge: it cannot manufacture tokens the LM has no pretrained prior on.
With steering_mode='raw_hidden' on LFM2.5-1.2B-Instruct Q4_K_M, articulate_scale=0.001 produced clean on-manifold steering while 0.005+ caused repetition garbage.
memory_bytes_per_delta was incorrectly averaged in the earlier extended learning evaluation, inflating NeuralHippocampus and Always-Wrong scores.
A schema-drift bug caused HippocampusOnlyAgent to store correction text under correction= while reading corrected_answer, so replay hints silently never reached the ranker.
OrganismAgent's persistent memory cost is dominated by the hippocampus, immune, and autoencoder pickled state.
